basic_details.job_title: Andrew Yule & Company Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Andrew Yule & Company Limited Management Trainee (Welfare) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website andrewyule.com. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the Andrew Yule & Company Limited Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD categories.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree of recognized University, Degree/Diploma in Labour Welfare/Social Science
qualification.details: Management Trainee (Welfare) - Assam Gardens: Degree of recognized University and degree or diploma in Labour welfare / Social Science recognized by the Government of Assam with adequate knowledge of Assamese and Hindi Management Trainee (Welfare) - West Bengal Gardens: Degree of recognized University and Post Graduate degree or diploma in Labour and Social Welfare recognized by the Government of West Bengal or Labour Welfare Officer's Training Course with thorough knowledge of Bengali and Hindi

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Andrew Yule & Company Limited Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Andrew Yule & Company Limited to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Andrew Yule & Company Limited Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Andrew Yule & Company Limited Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Andrew Yule & Company Limited Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Management Trainee (Welfare) - Assam Gardens: Degree of recognized University and degree or diploma in Labour welfare / Social Science recognized by the Government of Assam with adequate knowledge of Assamese and Hindi Management Trainee (Welfare) - West Bengal Gardens: Degree of recognized University and Post Graduate degree or diploma in Labour and Social Welfare recognized by the Government of West Bengal or Labour Welfare Officer's Training Course with thorough knowledge of Bengali and Hindi

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 32 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government norms for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PWD categories.

rows.event: Last date of receipt of online application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Andrew Yule & Company Limited Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Andrew Yule & Company Limited to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Andrew Yule & Company Limited Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the name of the organization releasing this recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The recruitment notification has been released by Andrew Yule & Company Limited, a prominent government organization. They are inviting applications for various posts.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this Andrew Yule & Company Limited recruitment?
faq.answer: Andrew Yule & Company Limited is recruiting for the post of Management Trainee (Welfare). There are specific vacancies for Assam Gardens and West Bengal Gardens.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are available in this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Management Trainee (Welfare) posts across both Assam and West Bengal Gardens.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates interested in applying for the Management Trainee (Welfare) posts must submit their applications through the online mode. The application link will be available on the official website.

faq.question: Q5. What are the important dates for applying to Andrew Yule & Company Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process begins on 4 July 2026. The last date for candidates to submit their online applications is 26 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Management Trainee (Welfare) posts?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Management Trainee (Welfare) posts should not exceed 32 years of age. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required qualifications for Management Trainee (Welfare)?
faq.answer: Applicants need a Degree from a recognized University and a Degree or Diploma in Labour Welfare/Social Science. Specific regional language knowledge is also required for respective garden locations.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Management Trainee (Welfare) position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Management Trainee (Welfare) post is Rs. 46230.00 per month. This applies to both Assam and West Bengal Garden vacancies.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for Andrew Yule & Company Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category, including General/OBC and SC/ST candidates. Applicants can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Management Trainee (Welfare) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Management Trainee (Welfare) posts will primarily involve an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and performance in the interview.
